focus: S11-S4-release (2026-07-02): 0.23.0 RELEASED to npm + #22/#23 shipped. Release (c6800c5d, tag v0.23.0): npm version --no-git-tag-version → one release commit carrying the apiVersion-window bump (CURRENT_PLUGIN_API_VERSION 0.22→0.23, registry previous-MINOR 0.21→0.22, 3 example plugin.yamls) + CHANGELOG retitle; local gates green (248 plugin incl. window test, 116 licensing/desktop, build:cli); CI run 28622699089 passed every gate incl. the npx prod smoke, OIDC-published; VERIFIED live: npm serves 0.23.0, GH Release has relay-next-build-0.23.0.tgz + .sha256 + SBOM. Gotcha: gh run watch --exit-status exited 0 on a transient network error mid-run — re-checked actual status/conclusion (→ memory release-and-issue-conventions). #22 (55b3ae7d): issue's 'missing await' claim was WRONG (verify-before-groom again) — the modal always awaited; real cause = hard navigation aborts the in-flight PUT + persistChoice never checked res.ok (silent-close on 5xx). Fix: keepalive:true, named PreferencePersistError, inline retryable role=alert error, event dispatch only after confirmed save; TDD 4 new tests (2 stub global fetch — injected persistChoice had hidden the default path); staging e2e: picked Balanced → immediate navigate → chat.modelPreference=balanced persisted, no re-ask. #23 (70db6926): addColumnIfMissing also suppresses 'no such table' (expected fresh-DB transient — the later CREATE includes the column; reorder rejected because ALTERs are the upgrade path for existing DBs); TDD console.error-spy test + legacy-upgrade tests still green; staging: fresh server.log opens 'Database ready.', zero ALTER failures. Both R4-clean, closed + shipped-labeled, [Unreleased] fix entries written.
